programme.title: Blackthorn, (2015, Western)
programme.desc: Sam Shepard is Butch Cassidy in this thrilling western about the legendary outlaw's return from exile. After years of quiet, he embarks on his greatest adventure since his glory days with the Sundance Kid.

programme.title: Billy the Kid, (2013, Western)
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter kills a member of an outlaw gang, all Hell breaks loose in this shoot-‘em-up tale of gun smoke and justice in the Old West.

programme.title: Heaven's Gate, (1981, Western)
programme.desc: This ambitious frontier epic features a lawman (Kris Kristofferson) and a hitman (Christopher Walken) who fight in a tragic class war between ranchers and starving immigrants.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven, (1966, Western)

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)

programme.desc: Jaden has a lot to learn about his new deck, as Aster's Destiny Heroes continue to devastate him!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: The heads of the school go head-to-head as Crowler faces Bonaparte to protect the Slifer Red dorm from destruction!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Chazz, now under the influence of the evil Master Sartorius, tries to convince Alexis to join the Society of Light.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden faces three-time video game champ Lorenzo to protect his dorm. But is Lorenzo working for the evil Master Sartorius!?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden faces a sleazy attorney, known as X, who's strategy is to destroy his opponent's deck!
programme.sub-title: Not Playing With a Full Deck

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: In his ongoing search for powerful duelists, Sartorius sets his sights on Hassleberry. But little does Sartorius know that this dino duelist has a startling secret!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden faces Princess Rose and her Frog Princes in a fairytale frenzy! Will it be a happy ending for Jaden?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Sartorius sends his elite team of duelists, known as the Light Brigade, to take down Jaden's best friends!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Syrus and Hassleberry are in for nasty weather as Frost and Thunder continue their onslaught.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: The last surviving member of the Light Brigade takes on Jaden. But who's really behind this duel?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: Jaden and Aster enter a virtual labyrinth to battle Sarina and her dueling partner…Sarina!?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX
programme.desc: The double duel continues as Aster and Jaden battle Sarina in a duel to determine who 'the chosen duelist!' is!

programme.title: Nami, Robin, and the others got away from Oden's Castle and now discuss what they have found out about the enemy so far. Meanwhile, Chopper's group sets off to rescue Luffy from the Excavation Labor Camp.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Bond Between Prisoners! Luffy and Old Man Hyo!

programme.title: At the Excavation Labor Camp in Udon, Luffy tries to save Old Man Hyo and stands up to Vice Warden Daifuku and Warden Babanuki with his physical strength weakened by the Sea Prism Stone cuffs.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Lead Performer! Queen the Plague Emerges!

programme.title: Luffy and Old Man Hyo try to climb up the wall and break out of the Excavation Labor Camp, but Queen the Plague stands in their way and gives them a hard time!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy fights quite a few Queen's men at once in the deadly sumo match while protecting Old Man Hyo! Meanwhile, Nami, Robin, and Shinobu are cornered as Hawkins comes to raid the bathhouse.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dead or Alive! Queen's Sumo Inferno!

programme.title: Luffy deals with the endless supply of opponents trying to figure out the way to use Haki that Rayleigh taught him a while ago. Meanwhile, Zoro faces Gyukimaru who is accusing him of stealing Shusui.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Gyukimaru! Zoro Fights a Duel on Bandit's Bridge!

programme.title: The duel between Zoro and Gyukimaru is interrupted by Kamazo, Orochi's assassin who came after a little girl Toko. Without Shusui, Zoro has a hard time fighting the two at the same time, but he finds an unlikely third sword to take down the enemies.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Big Turnover! The Three-Sword Style Overcomes Danger!

programme.title: Luffy's next enemies in the deadly sumo match in the Excavation Labor Camp are two tough Gifters. Much to Old Man Hyo's surprise, Luffy keeps practicing using Haki properly at the same time as he fights them.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro, Stunned! The Shocking Identity of the Mysterious Woman!

programme.title: Hiyori tells Zoro a stunning story of escaping the incident 20 years ago and surviving until the present day. Meanwhile, Luffy stills struggles to master the Haki of the Color of Arms, but a surprising person steps up and gives an example.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Get the Hang of It! The Land of Wano's Haki - Ryuo!

programme.title: Luffy continues training himself to use Haki with Old Man Hyo's help, but the battle is suddenly suspended and shortly thereafter Raizo appears in front of them. Meanwhile, Nami, Usopp, and the others are wondering who Tonoyasu really is.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Ushimitsu Kozo the great thief who robbed from the rich and gave to the poor gets caught and his true identity stuns Orochi and the others. When Toko hears the news, she gets very upset and so is Zoro when he hears the reason.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shaking the Nation! The Identity of Ushimitsu Kozo The Chivalrous Thief!

programme.title: Tonoyasu has been strung up and is soon-to-be executed. The people of the Land of Wano recognize who he really is and start raising their voice while the Straw Hats rush to save him. Then, Tonoyasu starts addressing the nation.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Straw Hats Run! Save the Captive Tonoyasu!

programme.title: By the time Kin'emon and the others notice that Yasuie is trying to sacrifice his life to save their raid plan, it was all too late. Ebisu Town's people laughing out loud annoys Zoro, but when Hiyori tells him the reason behind it, he is in for a shock!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro's Fury! The Truth About the Smile!

programme.title: Hiyori and Shinobu tearfully tell the Straw Hats the truth behind Ebisu Town residents' cheerfulness and smiles, which infuriates them. When Yasuie's daughter, Toko, runs to her father's body, Orochi recognizes who she is and takes a shot at her!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Zoro and Sanji start fighting against Orochi's clan. Nami and the rest of the Straw Hats join them. Meanwhile, at the Excavation Labor Camp, a new criminal, Hitokiri Kamazo, has arrived.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Straw Hats Step In! An Uproarious Deadly Battle at the Execution Ground!

programme.title: Zoro keeps fighting Kyoshiro, but Orochi's Oniwabanshu comes to back Kyoshiro up. Meanwhile, at the Excavation Labor Camp, Queen announces the restart of the Sumo Inferno with a new cruel rule.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy's Determination! Win Through the Sumo Inferno!

programme.title: Kin'emon apologizes Ashura Doji AKA Shutenmaru for goading Holdem to attack Atamayama where Ashura's hideout was located, and asks him to join the fight against Kaido. Meanwhile, Chopper and his group finally arrived at the Excavation Labor Camp!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Storm Has Come! A Raging Big Mom!

programme.title: Craving red-bean soup, Big Mom attacks Queen, the Animal Kingdom Pirates' Lead Performer who reins over Udon. However, when she finds out that the pot is empty, she turns her wrath against the one who ate it all: Luffy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Grudge Over Red-bean Soup! Luffy Gets into a Desperate Situation!

programme.title: After finding out that Luffy ate the whole pot ofthe red-bean soup that she was looking for, Big Mom becomes infuriated and goesafter him. Meanwhile, Queen, the Lead Performer, comes up with a plan to stopthe rampaging Big Mom.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Stop the Emperor of the Sea! Queen's Secret Plan!

programme.title: Queen hastily ties up the sleeping Big Mom and carries her to Onigashima leaving Udon to Babanuki. Babanuki uses a weapon that Queen made to threaten inmates and make them catch Luffy, but a mysterious figure emerges from the forbidden cell to save Luffy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Brutal Ammunition! The Plague Rounds Aim at Luffy!

programme.title: Kawamatsu the Kappa is freed and stands up against Babanuki and his underlings! Listening to Old Man Hyo's suggestion, Raizo and Kiku reveal their true identities which give the desperate prisoners not only a shock but also some hope.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Start Fighting Back! Luffy and the Akazaya Samurai!

programme.title: Luffy faces those who are infected by the Plague Rounds and the non-infected prisoners who submit to the authority of Udon. To open their eyes, Luffy takes a measure that will risk his life. However, the Chief Warden Babanuki has something up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: We’re Here to Win! Luffy's Desperate Scream!

programme.title: The freed prisoners in Udon refuse to fight alongside Luffy because he is a pirate. Raizo and Old Man Hyo try their best to convince them, but an unexpected person stands up to bring the prisoners hope after taking down Kaido!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Warriors' Dream! Luffy's Conquer of Udon!

programme.title: After standing against Orochi, Zoro and Hiyori are chased by Orochi's ninja group. Meanwhile, Orochi is told that they captured Trafalgar Law as the people of the Flower Capital prepare for the upcoming Fire Festival.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Orochi's Hunting Party! The Ninja Group vs. Zoro!

programme.title: Nami and Franky join Kanjuro who has taken Yasuie's dead body to bury him with Oden, and together they hit the road. Robin, Usopp, and Brook are at the dock trying to figure out a way to pass through a check point.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tension Rises in Onigashima! Two Emperors of the Sea Meet?!

programme.title: As the clash between Kaido and Big Mom continues, Queen looks for a way to get out of Onigashima. Meanwhile in Udon, Old Man Hyo finds his former allies, four bosses from each region.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hiyori's Confession! A Reunion at Bandit's Bridge!

programme.title: Zoro runs after the warrior-monk who took his Shusui and Kawamatsu shares with Hiyori his memory of a fox that was guarding the graves in Ringo. As they catch up to Zoro, they find a room filled with swords.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Its Name is Enma! Oden's Great Swords!

programme.title: As the day of the raid approaches, Law finds someone who might help him escape the prison and Kin'emon gathers up most of his main allies to discuss the raid plan. Meanwhile, at Onigashima, Kaido and Big Mom make a stunning declaration!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A New Alliance?! Kaido’s Army Gathers!

programme.title: Kin'emon, Momonosuke, and the others can't fight back tears when they hear that Hiyori is alive. Zoro is stunned by Enma's demonic power and its ties to him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Ticking Down to the Great Battle! The Straw Hats Go into Combat Mode!

programme.title: The resolution that passed the Reverie and the incidents surrounding the conference stun people all over the world and corner the Seven Warlords of the Sea. Meanwhile, a Navy captain Koby secretly contacts someone who is currently in the Land of Wano.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big News! An Incident That Will Affect the Seven Warlords!

programme.title: Admiral Issho and Fleet Admiral Sakazuki argue over the abolition of the Seven Warlord system and the alliance of the two Emperors of the Sea. Meanwhile, ex-Fleet Admiral Sengoku teaches the young Navy soldiers about the legendary Rocks Pirates.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Legendary Battle! Garp and Roger!

programme.title: On the day of the Fire Festival, Orochi leaves the mainland of the Land of Wano heading for Onigashima where a big banquet will take place.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rendezvous Port! The Land of Wano Act Three Begins!

programme.title: The night before the great battle, Orochi orders the destruction of the Sunny along with some bridges across the country to block Akazaya samurai's allies from their rendezvous.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Number-One Samurai in the Land of Wano! Here comes Kozuki Oden!

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Ultraviolet, (2006, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich, Cameron Bright Nick Chinlund and William Fichtner star in this theatrical set in the late 21st century, where some humans have been modified genetically by a vampire-like disease and the world is pushed to the brink of worldwide civil war.

programme.title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance, (2012, Adventure)
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze, aka Ghost Rider, is now hiding out in remote Eastern Europe, struggling to repress his curse. Blaze is recruited by a sect to take on the devil, who wants to take over his mortal son's body on the kid's birthday.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell, (1995, Anime)
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: Cyborg, (1989, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: El Dorado, (1966, Western)
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance, (1962, Western)
programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: Red River, (1948, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Rootin' Tootin' Rhythm, (1937, Western)
programme.desc: Ranch owner Gene Autry and his pal Frog Millhouse are after cattle rustlers and become mixed up in a comedy of errors when they don the clothes of two dead outlaws, only to learn that the outlaws are really dead sheriffs, dressed in outlaw's clothes!

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1, (1937, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry's crime fighting is tested when rustlers employ modern techniques. The newspaper's scathing editorials bash Gene's methods and demand to call in big city detectives. Old methods are tested.

programme.title: Zorro, (1975, Western)
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: Run For Cover, (1955, Western)
programme.desc: Ex-criminal in the old days of the West teaches a woman the ways of love and a boy the art of courage.

programme.title: Johnny Guitar, (1954, Western)
programme.desc: Gambling house operator Vienna seeks control of a town as archrival Emma Small sets out to force Vienna out of town. The timely arrival of Johnny Guitar thwarts Emma's dark plans, but doesn't prevent a showdown between the women.

programme.title: Freedom Writers, (2007, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programme.title: Center Stage, (2000, Romance)
programme.desc: The American Ballet Company is not for the fainthearted, it's for the most gifted and beautiful ballet dancers alive. But you'll need more than mere physical prowess and determination to succeed. PG-13

programme.title: Fame, (2009, Comedy)
programme.desc: Fame follows a talented group of dancers, singers, actors and artists over four years at the New York City High School of Performance Arts.

programme.title: Half Nelson, (2006, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A powerful, award-winning film about an inner-city junior high school teacher with a drug habit who forms an unlikely friendship with one of his students after she discovers his secret.

programme.title: Hardball, (2001, Drama)
programme.desc: An aimless young man who is scalping tickets, gambling and drinking, agrees to coach a Little League team from the Cabrini Green housing project in Chicago as a condition of getting a loan from a friend.

programme.title: Freedom Writers, (2007, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programme.title: The Ramen Girl, (2008, Dramedy)
programme.desc: An American adrift and abandoned by her boyfriend in Tokyo finds her calling in an unlikely place: a local ramen house run by a tyrannical chef who doesn't speak of a word of English.

programme.title: Uptown Girls, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl and Beth find shelter while another group has a realization about their own protection; Sasha, Bob and Maggie clash over a search mission.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The group lives a more peaceful life at the prison and strives to hold onto humanity; problems arise when Rick encounters a new survivor.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru starts to age at an accelerated rate, from a baby to a young girl within days. She warns of coming danger that will soon befall Sailor Moon.
programme.sub-title: Saturn Awakens: The Ten Sailor Guardians Unite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The city is being plagued by a strange illness that causes people to become obsessed with staring into the mirror for hours, even days.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Mirror: Mamoru Caught in a Nightmare

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon is left devastated after seeing Mamoru get abducted To make matters worse, Nehalennia’s action is starting to cause a time paradox.
programme.sub-title: Night of Destiny: The Sailor Guardians' Ordeals

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon runs off to save Mamoru from Nehalennia. The rest of the Sailor Guardians try to go after her, but they fall victim to Nehalennia’s traps.
programme.sub-title: For Love: The Endless Battle in the Dark World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Chibi Moon and Sailor Saturn make it to Nehalennia’s palace, where Mamoru is being held prisoner. The two Guardians are unable to free him.
programme.sub-title: Moon Power of Love: The Nightmare Ends

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru tells Usagi that he’s accepted an offer to study abroad in the U.S., which will force them to have a long-distance relationship.
programme.sub-title: Farewells and Encounters: The Transitioning Stars of Destiny

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi runs into Seiya and is annoyed by his cocky attitude. The next day, Seiya and the rest of Three Lights have transferred to her school.
programme.sub-title: A School Storm: The Transfer Students Are Idols

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako decides to work for the Three Lights as their personal assistant. But Minako soon realizes that being a star is not all fun and glamor.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Three Lights are rehearsing for their upcoming musical. But they seem to have a hard time winning the approval of the stage director.
programme.sub-title: Fighter's Secret Identity: The Shocking Super Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami invites Taiki to come and watch the Wataru’s Comet pass by Earth with their science teacher Amanogawa, only to be rejected.
programme.sub-title: A Star of Dreams and Wishes: Taiki's Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls are searching for Luna, who has gone missing. To their surprise, they find Luna being introduced on TV as Yaten’s pet cat.
programme.sub-title: Luna's Discovery: The Real Face of Yaten

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Taiki asks Makoto to appear on a cooking show with him. Usagi decides to tag along, but her clumsiness creates a huge mess at the TV studio.
programme.sub-title: Friend or Foe? Star Lights and the Sailor Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls try to buy tickets to a Three Lights concert. Michiru gives them the tickets, revealing that she will be preforming.
programme.sub-title: Calling of the Shining Stars: Enter Haruka and Michiru

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Seiya asks Usagi out on a date, to which she agrees. Sailor Iron Mouse attempts to make up for her recent failures by going after Seiya’s star seed.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Luna encounter a girl who appears to be lost. The two are surprised to find the same girl now living in Usagi’s house as her younger sister.
programme.sub-title: Invaders from Outer Space: The Coming of Siren

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Over the summer, the girls go camping in the mountains, where they run into the Three Lights, who are there shooting for an upcoming film.
programme.sub-title: The Screaming Dead: Terror of the Camp Monster

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi ends up agreeing to let Seiya spend the night at her place. Worried about leaving two teenagers together, the rest of the girls decide to join.
programme.sub-title: A Night Alone Together: Usagi in Danger

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Taiki begins to question if their activity as Three Lights is really helping with their goal of finding their missing princess.
programme.sub-title: Taiki's Song Filled with Passion and Faith

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Chibi has been coming home with lots of snacks. Curious where she’s getting the snacks from, Usagi and the girls decide to follow Chibi-Chibi.
programme.sub-title: Chibi-Chibi's Mystery: The Big Noisy Chase

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi teamed up with Seiya for the school softball tournament. Usagi becomes a target of Seiya’s jealous fans, who think she is hitting on him.
programme.sub-title: The Shining Power of a Star: Chibi-Chibi's Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Aluminum Siren learns that Usagi is Sailor Moon. She sets a trap on a plane in order to get Usagi’s attention.
programme.sub-title: Invitation to Terror: Usagi's Night Flight

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A rift is created between the Sailor Guardians and the Star Lights after they discover each other’s secret identities.
programme.sub-title: Duty or Friendship: Conflict Between the Sailor Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Uranus and the other Outer Guardians warn the Star Lights to never see Sailor Moon again. Usagi is worried about Seiya after he gets injured.
programme.sub-title: Truth Revealed: The Star Lights' Past

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami and the others try to clear up the misunderstanding the Three Lights have about Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Butterflies of Light: A New Chapter on the Horizon

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako is close to realizing her lifelong dream of becoming an idol after making it to the final round of auditions in a talent-search contest.
programme.sub-title: Go for Your Dream: Minako Becomes an Idol

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Lead Crow finds a note left behind by her deceased friend Sailor Aluminum Siren that contains information on Sailor Moon’s true identity.
programme.sub-title: The Stolen Silver Crystal: Princess Kakyu Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Princess Kakyu appears before the Sailor Guardians. Princess Kakyu explains that she has come to Earth in search of the Light of Hope.
programme.sub-title: Crusade for the Galaxy: Legend of the Sailor Wars

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi finally confesses to Rei that she’s been unable to get in touch with Mamoru. The Three Lights publicly announce their intention to disband.
programme.sub-title: Princess Kakyu Perishes: Advent of Galaxia

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Princess Kakyu perishes after being defeated by Galaxia. The Sailor Star Lights go after Galaxia to avenge their fallen princess.
programme.sub-title: Countdown to Destruction: The Sailor Guardians' Last Battle

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Justiça a Qualquer Preço, (2007)
programme.desc: 2007. Um hiper vigilante de segurança treina uma jovem substituta e, ao mesmo tempo, rastreia uma garota desaparecida que ele está convencido de estar ligada a um criminoso sexual em liberdade condicional, que ele está investigando. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Richard Gere, Claire Danes, KaDee Strickland, Ray Wise, Russell Sams, Avril Lavigne, Kristina Romero, Dwayne L. Barnes, Matt Schulze, Debrianna Mansin... Diretor: Andrew Lau Wai-Keung, Wai Keung Lau

programme.title: O Anjo da Morte, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Um policial disfarçado se aproxima de seu inimigo. Ela decide deixar um agente de confiança entrar em campo, mas tem dúvidas se ela tem o que é preciso para completar a missão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Sobreviva a noite, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Um intenso filme de ação, que traz Dolph Lundgren como um agente da Interpol protegendo sua esposa e filha de um criminoso implacável e seus mercenários em um vilarejo italiano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Hal Yamanouchi, Natalie Burn Diretor: Giorgio Bruno

programme.title: Redes do Crime, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Dois amigos, se envolvem com o crime, mas o vício e os planos de um grande roubo os levam à prisão. Anos depois, Brian, volta para casa, mas precisa enfrentar a realidade: o crime moldou sua vida. uscando redenção, ele luta para reconstruir sua família. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ethan Hawke, Mark Ruffalo, Amanda Peet, Donnie Wahlberg, Will Lyman, Brian Goodman, Angela Featherstone, Edward Lynch, Johnny Serret, Lenny Clarke Diretor: Brian Goodman

programme.title: Céu em Chamas, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. Midori, uma relutante noiva japonesa, forja seu sequestro durante a lua-de-mel em Sidney. Sozinha e desnorteada num país estranho, é feita refém num assalto a banco. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Russell Crowe, Youki Kudoh, Kenji Isomura, Ray Barrett, Robert Mammone, Petru Gheorghiu, Anthony Phelan, Matthew Dyktynski, Colin Hay, Susan Prior Diretor: Craig Lahiff

programme.title: Sem Perdão, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Victor trabalha com um grande criminoso. Um dia, ele encontra Beatrice, vítima de um crime, que pede a ajuda de Victor para ajudá-la em sua vingança. Para convencê-lo a cooperar, ela o chantageira com provas de um assassinato que Victor cometeu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Colin Farrell, Dominic Cooper, Noomi Rapace Diretor: Niels Arden Oplev

programme.title: Caçada ao Presidente, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Após o avião em que estava ter sido abatido por terroristas, o presidente dos Estados Unidos está ferido e perdido no meio de uma zona rural finlandesa. E sua vida agora está nas mãos de Oskari um tímido jovem de treze anos de idade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Samuel L. Jackson, Onni Tommila, Ray Stevenson Diretor: Jalmari Helander

programme.title: Caçado, (2003)
programme.desc: 2003. Aaron Hallam é um perigoso assassino, que mata suas vítimas de um modo peculiar: ele perseguia caçadores de cervos como se fosse um esporte, em uma floresta de Portland. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tommy Lee Jones, Connie Nielsen, Benicio Del Toro, Leslie Stefanson, John Finn, José Zúñiga, Ron Canada, Mark Pellegrino, Jenna Boyd, Aaron DeCone Diretor: William Friedkin

programme.title: Blitz, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Blitz é um serial killer de Londres que está matando policiais. O inspetor-chefe Roberts e o sargento Brant, um detetive de polícia duro, inflexível e politicamente incorreto, terão a tarefa de tentar deter o psicopata. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Paddy Considine, Aidan Gillen, David Riley Diretor: Elliott Lester, Jordan Hill

programme.title: Risco Absoluto, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Liberado após seis anos preso por um crime que não cometeu, Shane Danielsnão demora a se meter novamente em encrenca. Ele testemunha um crime e para salvar uma jovem sequestrada se envolve com a máfia chinesa, russos e policiais corruptos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: O Franco-Atirador, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Depois de uma longa carreira como matador de aluguel, Martin Terrier pretende se aposentar e passar o resto da vida ao lado de sua amada. Mas ele descobre que está sendo traído por pessoas de sua confiança! Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Sean Penn, Jasmine Trinca, Javier Bardem Diretor: Pierre Morel

programme.title: Carga Explosiva 3, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Frank Martin é obrigado a conduzir Valentina, a filha de Leonid Vasilev, o chefe da Agência de Proteção Ambiental da Ucrânia, de Marselha a Odessa, além de dois sacos de conteúdo suspeito. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Robert Knepper, Natalya Rudakova, François Berléand, Jeroen Krabbé, Alex Kobold, David Atrakchi, Yann Sundberg, Eriq Ebouaney, David Kammenos Diretor: Olivier Megaton

programme.title: Sobreviva a noite, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Um intenso filme de ação, que traz Dolph Lundgren como um agente da Interpol protegendo sua esposa e filha de um criminoso implacável e seus mercenários em um vilarejo italiano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Hal Yamanouchi, Natalie Burn Diretor: Giorgio Bruno

programme.title: O Substituto 4, (2001)
programme.desc: 2001. O ex-mercenário Karl Thomasson retorna mais uma vez como professor substituto, desta vez para se infiltrar no corpo docente de uma escola militar e cessar as ações dos supremacistas brancos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Treat Williams, Angie Everhart, Patrick Kilpatrick, Bill Nunn, Tim Abell Diretor: Robert Radler

programme.title: Anjos da Noite, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. programme.title: Hampstead: Nunca é Tarde Para Amar, (2019)

programme.title: Paixão à Flor da Pele, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Quando a namorada Lisa desaparece misteriosamente, Matthew inicia uma busca obsessiva para encontrá-la, sem sucesso. Anos depois, sua vida se estabiliza e ele fica noivo. Ao ver uma mulher num restaurante, ele acha que é Lisa e a obsessão recomeça. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Josh Hartnett, Rose Byrne, Matthew Lillard, Diane Kruger, Christopher Cousins, Jessica Paré, Vlasta Vrana, Amy Sobol, Ted Whittall, Isabel Dos Santos Diretor: Paul McGuigan

programme.title: Sabrina, (1995)
programme.desc: 1995. O chofer de uma rica família envia sua filha Sabrina a Paris para ela superar uma paixão pelo playboy da família, David. Ela volta e atrai a atenção de David, que está para se casar. O irmão dele, Linus, tenta impedir, mas também se encanta com ela. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Harrison Ford, Julia Ormond, Greg Kinnear, Nancy Marchand, John Wood, Lauren Holly, Angie Dickinson, J. Smith-Cameron, Richard Crenna, Dana Ivey Diretor: Sydney Pollack

programme.title: Lar Doce Lar ... Ou não, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Victoria Tremont, entediada com a vida, quer encontrar alguém especial. Um estranho entra na cafeteria e não responde ao seu charme. Ela descobre que ele dirige um ministério de moradias e decide se voluntariar, mesmo que precise mentir. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Natasha Bure, Ben Elliott, Krista Kalmus, Sarah Kim, Juli Erickson, Gabriel Cortez Jr., Josephine Keefe, Jacqueline Lea, Aubrey Shimek Davis, Saint Lo... Diretor: Juan Michael Konshuk-Mas (Director), Juan Mas

programme.title: The Beautiful Beast, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Isabelle, uma beleza apenas no exterior, conhece Jeremy, um homem áspero que se esconde do seu passado. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Shona Kay, Brad Johnson, Melanie Gardner Diretor: Bryan Carzan

programme.title: Meteoro: O Fim dos Tempos, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Quando um meteoro de enorme proporção ameaça destruir a Terra, um grupo de cientistas corre contra o tempo para encontrar uma maneira de salvar a humanidade da extinção. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Anthony Jensen, Brett Justin Koppel, Caroline Williams, Christina Semaan, Eva Ceja, Jeremiah Musgrove, Natalie Storrs, Patrick Labyorteaux, Joseph Michael Harris, Karan Sagoo Diretor: Noah Luke

programme.title: O Ataque do Tubarão de 3 Cabeças, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. A maior máquina de matar do mundo é três vezes mais mortal quando um tubarão mutante ameaça um navio de cruzeiro. Os passageiros lutam contra o predador mortal usando tudo que podem encontrar. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Danny Trejo, Karrueche Tran, Rob Van Dam, Jaason Simmons Diretor: Christopher Douglas-Olen Ray

programme.title: Regressão, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Aos 16 anos de idade, Anna é filha de um dos casais mais ricos dos Estados Unidos. Esta garota inteligente e manipuladora acabou de passar por um grande trauma relacionado à sua família. Para investigar o caso, o perito John é convocado. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Mark Strong, Taissa Farmiga, Brian Cox Diretor: Jorge Dorado

programme.title: Monstros: Continente Sombrio, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Dez anos após os acontecimentos de "Monstros", as "Zonas Infectadas" agora se espalharam pelo mundo, e um pelotão americano é lançado em batalha contra uma nova raça de alienígenas. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Joe Dempsie, Johnny Harris, Nicholas Pinnock, Sam Keeley, Sofia Boutella Diretor: Tom Green

programme.title: Força Invasora, (1998)
programme.desc: 1998. Um capitão da Força Aérea persegue os agentes do governo que sequestraram sua filha depois de descobrir que ela tem incríveis poderes. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Michael Madsen, Robert Vaughn, Dyan Cannon Diretor: Richard Pepin

programme.title: O Som do Trovão, (2003)
programme.desc: 2003. No ano de 2055, o esporte predileto dos ricos é viajar no tempo para caçar dinossauros. A diversão tem apenas uma regra: é proibido trazer do passado qualquer lembrancinha, viva ou morta, já que isto geraria uma série de reações que modificaria o presente Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Heike Makatsch, Armin Rohde, David Oyelowo, Wilfried Hochholdinger, Edward Burns, Jemima Rooper, Ben Kingsley, August Zirner, Catherine McCormack, Alv... Diretor: Peter Hyams

programme.title: Invasão das Sereias, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Um jovem noivo deve partir para resgatar sua noiva depois que ela for sequestrada por sereias e tritões. Enquanto arrisca sua vida para salvá-la, ele descobre a verdadeira razão pela qual os sereianos travaram uma guerra contra os humanos. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Wu Jian-Fei, Liang Xiao-Long, Yu Xiao-Wan, Lu Yong, Zhang Xi-Lai Diretor: Wang Yanpeng

programme.title: Mega Shark vs. Mecha Shark, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Quando um novo Mega Shark ameaça a humanidade, o governo desencadeia o secreto Mecha Shark para derrotar o monstro em uma batalha campal que ameaça o planeta. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Christopher Judge, Elisabeth Rohm, Debbie Gibson Diretor: Emile Edwin Smith

programme.title: O Último Dia, (2016)

programme.title: O Jurássico, (2022)

programme.title: Cães de Luta, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Na tradição de UNDERWORLD e DISTRICT 9, toda Manhattan fica em quarentena quando o vírus Lupin se espalha como fogo, transformando civis inocentes em lobos vorazes. Nada menos que uma explosão nuclear pode parar o vírus monstruoso. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Dennis Haysbert, Craig Sheffer, Ariana Richards, Ernie Hudson, Bill Duke, Wes Studi, Kate Vernon Diretor: Alexander Yellen

programme.title: Megaterremoto, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Enquanto um terremoto de enorme proporção ameaça atingir a cidade de São Francisco, uma equipe de especialistas em desastres naturais trabalha para salvar o maior número de vidas possível antes que a cidade seja completamente destruída. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Grant Bowler, Jack Pearson, Mckenzie Westmore, Mica Javier, Tola Lawal, Tori Griffith, Tyler Christopher, William Baldwin, McKenzie Westmore, Jessie B. Evans Diretor: Jared Cohn

programme.title: Ataque do Tubarão Mutante, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Quando um navio do Semestre no Mar é afundado por um tubarão de duas cabeças, os sobreviventes fogem para um atol deserto. Mas quando começa a inundar, os aliados não estão mais a salvo das mandíbulas duplas do monstro. programme.title: O Lago dos Tubarões, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Meredith Hernandez é uma jovem mãe e agente policial de uma cidade perto do pacífico Lago Tahoe. Quando uma série de ataques de tubarões provocou o pânico na cidade, ela e um perito em tubarões decidiram investigar os estranhos incidentes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Danny Roth, Sara Lane Diretor: Jerry Dugan

programme.title: A Vida Acontece, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Kim divide apartamento com duas amigas, mas a rotina da casa muda quando ela fica grávida. Agora, além de ter que descobrir como cuidar de uma criança, Kim também quer resolver sua vida amorosa. programme.title: Amigos, Amigos, Mulheres à Parte, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. programme.title: Esqueceram de Nós, (1970)

programme.desc: 1970. O Garoto-Formiga entra em sua adolescência e pensa em se aposentar, mas muda de ideia quando seu arqui-inimigo é liberto da prisão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1988. O super guerreiro, o Robô Kaima Skraid, já foi uma vez banido pelo Imperador Crisis e General Jark de suas operações por perder o controle e não respeitar ordens devido a seu imenso poder destrutivo. Gatezon pretende reconstruí-lo para confrontar RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E11

programme.title: 1988. O Feiticeiro Kaima Cerebron é capaz de entrar nos sonhos das pessoas e manipular suas mentes. Com isso, o próximo alvo do Império Crisis nada mais é que a própria Reiko, fazendo-a atacar e temer Issamu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E12

programme.title: 1988. O Homem Míssil pede ajuda de Jiraya para proteger Tao, uma menina criada como filha do herói depois da Guerra no Vietnã, mas eles são surpreendidos pela família de feiticeiros que sequestra a menina e levam a foguete do Homem Míssil . programme.title: 1988. O planeta Mãe das Trevas se aproxima da Terra e Uchūnin Dell-Star finalmente quer a sua vingança. programme.desc: South Park - T02E14

programme.title: 1999. Vários habitantes de South Park estão ficando cada vez mais furiosos, e sem alguma razão aparente. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. Enquanto isso, um dos professores está sendo atormentado por uma recordação de sua falecida namorada, e Kenny conquista um homem rico na aula de cozinha. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. Enquanto isso, Kenny tenta evitar que seus pais tenham outro filho. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker

programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E13

programme.title: 2002. Os rapazes ganham muitos doces em um concurso, mas para conseguir o grande prêmio, precisam do cupom vencedor, que é aquele que ficou com Kenny antes de morrer. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E12

programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. Porém, ele morre ao chegar no nível 60 do jogo, e vai ao céu, onde fica sabendo que Deus o matou de propósito, já que precisam dele para que salve o céu de um ataque de Satanás. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E04

programme.title: 2008. Numa homenagem ao filme de 1981, Heavy Metal, os garotos estão tentando convencer Kenny a largar a última droga da moda que viciou rapidamente os alunos do ensino médio. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T12E03

programme.title: 2009. Kenny leva sua namorada ao show dos Jonas Brothers, mas com segundas intenções. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Jhon Hansen, Matt Stone, Mickey Ramos, Milan Agnone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T13E01

programme.title: 2010. Cartman quer se tornar um corredor da NASCAR, mas ele acha que não tem condições porque não é "pobre e suficientemente estúpido" para alcançar seus sonhos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E08

programme.title: 2010. A verdadeira identidade de Mysterion finalmente é revelada. Enquanto isso, Guaxinim, desprezado por seus amigos super-heróis, está com sede de vingança. programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E13

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E15

programme.title: 2009. Raimon está preso no meio de um jogo contra a True Teikoku Academy, e Kageyama convenceu seus jogadores a usarem todos os meios para vencer; mesmo que isso signifique a destruição de suas mentes e corpos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E38

programme.title: 2009. Raimon finalmente chega em casa para recarregar as baterias e treinar muito mais. Eles descobrem que todo mundo está treinando para ajudá-los, incluindo alguns antigos oponentes. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E39

programme.title: 2009. Assim que chegam em casa, e Raimon estão de volta à estrada novamente - desta vez eles estão indo para akasaka, onde há rumores de que a Aliea Academy tem uma base. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E40

programme.title: 2009. Raimon acha que o centro de treinamento secreto do CCC sob o parque de diversões é um ótimo lugar para se treinar, mas de onde veio. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E41

programme.title: 2009. O grande jogo contra Epsilon está aqui, e Raimon sai com toda a força! Eles serão capazes de lutar contra os alienígenas. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: Epsilon A batalha mais difícil ainda
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E42

programme.title: 2009. Notícias inesperadas sobre outro caderno de Daisuke envia Raimon para Fukuoka, onde eles encontram um dos velhos amigos de Daisuke e alguém que pode se tornar o aprendiz de Endou. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E43

programme.title: 2009. O jogo de exibição entre Raimon e Yokato Junior High é um caso difícil. Endou e Tachimukai estão exibindo seus goleiros. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E44

programme.title: 2009. Hiroto, que na verdade é Gran, capitão do The Genesis - desafia Raimon para um jogo. Ele rapidamente se transforma em uma partida unilateral, já que o Genesis continua marcando e nenhum dos Raimon Eleven consegue acompanhar seus movimentos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E45

programme.title: 2009. A decisão de Kazemaru de deixar o time deixou Endou arrasado e tirou sua vontade de praticar. Nada que alguém diga parece ter um efeito nele. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E46

programme.title: 2009. As notícias sobre a existência de um atacante de chamas mandam Raimon para Okinawa, esperando que seja Gouenji Shuuya. Mas que coisas inesperadas podem acontecer ao longo do caminho. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A grande batalha no mar do sul
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E47

programme.title: 2009. Logo após chegar a Okinawa, Raimon inicia a busca pelo atacante. Enquanto procuram, Fubuki e Domon encontram um jogador que afirma ser o atacante. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E48

programme.title: 2009. O tsunami revela a Raimon que ele se juntou ao clube de futebol da escola e eles querem brincar com eles. Raimon vai para o Oumihara Junior High, e o jogo começa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: O jogo de futebol rítmico radical
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E49

programme.title: 2009. O jogo entre Raimon e Oumihara continua, sem nenhuma das equipes se afastando. No final, Raimon vence, mas é uma vitória estreita. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E50

programme.title: 2009. O Epsilon se tornou o Epsilon Remastered e desafia Raimon para a batalha. Mas não são apenas eles que estão nivelados, Raimon também. Mas eles ainda não conseguem romper as técnicas de Desarm, nem mesmo Fubuki. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E51

programme.title: 2009. A partida entre Raimon e Epsilon Remastered continua sua segunda metade. Embora eles tentem o seu melhor, Desarm é muito rápido e poderoso para eles. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2016. Rohan fica em apuros depois de ver as costas de Kinoto. Um jovem surge diante de Josuke com um papel dobrado que esconde algo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E33

programme.title: 2016. Rohan não pode expor as costas e pede ajuda a Koichi, que não acredita nele. Apesar do risco que corre, Rohan vai ao hotel de Jotaro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E34

programme.title: 2016. Kawajiri finalmente acaba com Hayato. Depois de saberem o que houve com Hayato, Rohan e os outros vão verificar a casa de Kawajiri. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E35

programme.title: 2016. Hayato percebe que todos os que ficam sabendo de Yoshikage Kira através dele morrem e que, depois disso, a mesma manhã se repete. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E36

programme.title: 2016. Kira pretende remover o terceiro poder, Bites The Dust, porque Hayato matou várias pessoas e voltou à mesma manhã. Mas alguém surge diante de Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E37

programme.title: 2016. Uma bomba de ar invade a casa onde Josuke e Hayato estão escondidos. Nenhum dos dois sabe como a bomba conseguiu detectá-los. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E38

programme.title: 2016. Mesmo encurralado, Kira não desiste. Ele usa o Bites The Dust em uma socorrista e tenta explodir o tempo ativando o detonador pelo Deadly Queen. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: Adeus, Morioh – O coração de ouro
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T03E39

programme.title: 2018. Com o Stand mais apropriado, Koichi Hirose chega a Nápoles em busca de Haruno Shiobana, suspeito de ser filho de Dio Brando. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E01

programme.title: 2018. A vida de Giorno, uma criança abandonada, muda quando ele ajuda um mafioso a escapar da morte. Giorno aprende mais sobre seus poderes ao enfrentar Bruno Bucciarati. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E02

programme.title: 2018. Determinado a ingressar na máfia, Giorno vai à prisão falar com Polpo, um dos principais membros da Passione, e recebe um teste de iniciação impossível. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: Conheça o gângster atrás do muro
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E03

programme.title: 2018. Giorno luta contra o Stand de Polpo, que pode se movimentar livremente pelas sombras. Koichi conta a Giorno sobre a flecha que produz um Stand. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E04

programme.title: 2018. Quando a notícia do tesouro escondido de Polpo se espalha entre os membros da Passione, Bucciarati e seu bando partem para pegá-lo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: Em busca da fortuna de Polpo!
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E05

programme.title: 2018. Com o desaparecimento misterioso da tripulação de Bucciarati no convés, Abbacchio lança seu Stand, Moody Jazz, para investigar esse preocupante fenômeno. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E06

programme.title: 2018. O bando descobre que sua chegada a Capri reserva um perigo. Com Giorno, Mista começa a neutralizar o inimigo com seu Stands, o Six Bullets. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E07

programme.title: 2018. Mista é atraído para um caminhão em movimento. Nele, o Stand de Sale, Arts & Crafts, mostra sua habilidade de controlar as balas do Six Bullet. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E08

programme.title: 2018. Bucciarati entrega as joias de Polpo ao Chefe, Pericolo, e é promovido a caporegime da Passione. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E09

programme.title: 2018. Durante uma operação, Narancia é interceptado por Formaggio, membro do Time de Assassinos, que encolhe o capanga usando os poderes de Tiny Feet. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E10

programme.title: 2018. Narancia, cada vez menor, tenta se manter vivo enquanto Formaggio continua a pressioná-lo para descobrir o paradeiro da filha do chefe. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E11

programme.title: 2018. Bucciarati envia Giorno e seus homens para as ruínas de Pompeia, onde um confronto com Illuso prende Fugo em um mundo de espelhos sem seu Stand. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E12

programme.title: 2018. Abbacchio tenta recuperar a chave para transferir a filha do chefe para um lugar seguro, mas antes ele precisa enfrentar Illuso no mundo dos espelhos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E13

programme.title: 2019. Com ordens para embarcar em um trem com destino a Florença, a equipe de Bucciarati não conseguem descobrir como usar a chave, e os assassinos estão se aproximando. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E14

programme.title: 2019. A equipe de Bucciarati está envelhecendo rápido por causa de um ataque desconhecido. Mista aparece para investigar, mas logo é surpreendido por um Stand Beach Boy. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E15

programme.title: 2019. Comovido com a determinação do agonizante Prosciutto em manter seu Stand Thankful Death ativado, Pesci decide enfrentar Bucciarati. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E16

programme.title: 2019. Merone usa o corpo de uma jovem para gerar um Stand e o envia atrás de Trish, que dá sinais de ser uma usuária de Stand. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T04E17

programme.desc: An English charmer (Hugh Grant) and a lusty American (Andie MacDowell) make love over a course of surprising events.

programme.title: Scared Stiff (1953)
programme.desc: Gangsters chase a singer (Dean Martin) and his sidekick (Jerry Lewis) to an heiress's (Lizabeth Scott) haunted castle off Cuba.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure (1989)
programme.desc: Two dopey dudes (Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter) go back in time to fetch Beethoven, Napoleon and other biggies for a history project.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey (1991)
programme.desc: The dopey dudes (Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter) beat the Grim Reaper (William Sadler) in a board-game contest, so he must help them stop their evil robot twins.

programme.title: Overboard (1987)
programme.desc: A yachtsman's (Edward Herrmann) wife (Goldie Hawn) falls overboard, forgets who she is and becomes an Oregon carpenter's (Kurt Russell) mate.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: Elizabethtown (2005)
programme.desc: In Kentucky to bury his father, a troubled man (Orlando Bloom) gets his life on track with the help of a free-spirited flight attendant (Kirsten Dunst).

programme.title: The Dark Half (1993)
programme.desc: A Maine professor's (Timothy Hutton) hidden bad side comes alive under his notorious but successful pen name.

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: A family's life in small-town Maine is shattered by the evil unleashed from an ancient American Indian burial ground.

programme.title: Poltergeist (1982)
programme.desc: A suburban couple's (Craig T. Nelson, JoBeth Williams) little girl is drawn from her bedroom into a nightmarish other dimension.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side (1986)
programme.desc: An American Indian helps a broke and homeless family (JoBeth Williams, Craig T. Nelson), once again prey to a poltergeist (Julian Beck).

programme.title: Poltergeist III (1988)
programme.desc: Destructive demons follow a little girl (Heather O'Rourke) sent to live with her aunt (Nancy Allen) and uncle (Tom Skerritt) in a Chicago high-rise.

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: A family's life in small-town Maine is shattered by the evil unleashed from an ancient American Indian burial ground.

programme.title: Wicker Park (2004)
programme.desc: An engaged man, Simon, searches obsessively for his former lover, Lisa, who disappeared two years earlier.

programme.title: West Side Story (1961)
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of vicious gang warfare between the New Yorker Jets and the Puerto Rican Sharks, a romance develops across rival lines. 1960s update of "Romeo and Juliet", with amazing song and dance sequences.

programme.title: Scouts Guide to the Zombie Apocalypse (2015)
programme.sub-title: Scouts Guide to the Zombie Apocalypse (2015)
programme.desc: Three Boy Scouts (Tye Sheridan, Logan Miller, Joey Morgan) join forces with a tough cocktail waitress (Sarah Dumont) to save their once-peaceful town from a zombie invasion.

programme.title: Carrie (1976)
programme.desc: A social misfit (Sissy Spacek) with psychic powers wreaks havoc at her prom to get even with pranksters.

programme.title: Poltergeist (1982)
programme.desc: A suburban couple's (Craig T. Nelson, JoBeth Williams) little girl is drawn from her bedroom into a nightmarish other dimension.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side (1986)
programme.desc: An American Indian helps a broke and homeless family (JoBeth Williams, Craig T. Nelson), once again prey to a poltergeist (Julian Beck).

programme.title: Poltergeist III (1988)
programme.desc: Destructive demons follow a little girl (Heather O'Rourke) sent to live with her aunt (Nancy Allen) and uncle (Tom Skerritt) in a Chicago high-rise.

programme.title: Capote (2005)
programme.desc: Writer Truman Capote (Philip Seymour Hoffman) researches the brutal murder of a Kansas family to pen the book "In Cold Blood."

programme.title: Rain Man (1988)
programme.desc: A wheeler-dealer (Tom Cruise) meets his brother (Dustin Hoffman), an institutionalized autistic-savant, heir to $3 million.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One (2024)
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: Flatliners (1990)
programme.desc: Medical students (Kiefer Sutherland, Julia Roberts, Kevin Bacon) play with death by stopping one another's vital signs for minutes, then zapping the subject back to consciousness.

programme.title: Smile 2 (2024)
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life.

programme.title: Biker Boyz (2003)
programme.desc: A young prodigy (Derek Luke) threatens the undefeated champion (Laurence Fishburne) of an underground club of motorcycle racers.

programme.title: Hour of the Gun (1967)
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp (James Garner) deputizes Doc Holliday (Jason Robards) and forms a posse to hunt Ike Clanton (Robert Ryan) and his gang.

programme.title: In Old California (1942)
programme.desc: A Boston druggist (John Wayne) and a gambler (Albert Dekker) fight over a singer (Binnie Barnes) during the 1849 gold rush.

programme.title: Return of the Seven (1966)
programme.desc: The man in black (Yul Brynner) forms a new Magnificent Seven, to save Mexican farmers from slave labor.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman (1982)
programme.desc: A hardened loner (Richard Gere) shapes up for a military drill instructor (Louis Gossett Jr.) and a factory girl (Debra Winger) from town.

programme.title: Ghost World (2001)
programme.desc: The lives of best friends diverge after high-school graduation and their encounter with a pathetic loner.

programme.title: What's the Worst That Could Happen? (2001)
programme.sub-title: What's the Worst That Could Happen? (2001)
programme.desc: When a professional thief robs a beachfront mansion, he catches the owner in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Weekend in Taipei (2024)
programme.desc: A former DEA agent and an ex-undercover operative rekindle their romance during a weekend in Taipei. As they reconnect, they're oblivious to the looming dangers stemming from their past operations.

programme.title: Into the Blue (2005)
programme.desc: Sam, Jared, Bryce and Amanda go on a treasure-hunting trip, where they discover a downed airplane full of cocaine alongside a famous shipwreck. Unknown to Sam and Jared, Bryce makes a fatal mistake and decides to sell the cocaine.

programme.title: Blown Away (1994)
programme.desc: An Irish explosive expert targets an old foe and his family living in Boston.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning (2025)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate for money to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards joins the top-rated show on television, "The Running Man," a deadly competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels (1988)
programme.desc: An American con man (Steve Martin) and his British rival (Michael Caine) target a soap heiress (Glenne Headly) from Cleveland on the French Riviera.

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse (1969)
programme.desc: A young man (John Phillip Law) hunts his parents' killers with a veteran gunfighter (Lee Van Cleef) who has something to hide.

programme.title: The Visitor (2022)
programme.desc: When Robert and his wife move to her childhood home, he discovers an old portrait in the attic of a man who looks just like him. He soon travels down a frightening rabbit hole as he tries to discover the true identity of his mysterious doppelgà¤nger.

programme.title: Smurfs (2025)
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Throw Momma From the Train (1987)
programme.desc: Two writers mistake a series of tit-for-tat murders, confusing one's ex-wife for the other's beastly mother.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure (1989)
programme.desc: Two dopey dudes (Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter) go back in time to fetch Beethoven, Napoleon and other biggies for a history project.

programme.title: Soapdish (1991)
programme.desc: The star (Sally Field) of a soap opera is rattled by her ex-lover's (Kevin Kline) return to the daytime drama The Sun Also Sets.

programme.title: The Heartbreak Kid (2007)
programme.desc: After his new bride reveals her nasty nature, a man (Ben Stiller) meets the woman (Michelle Monaghan) who may be his real soul mate and tries to woo her.

programme.title: Overboard (1987)
programme.desc: A yachtsman's (Edward Herrmann) wife (Goldie Hawn) falls overboard, forgets who she is and becomes an Oregon carpenter's (Kurt Russell) mate.

programme.title: Father of the Bride (1991)
programme.desc: A harried patriarch (Steve Martin) faces separation anxiety, exorbitant costs and more as he prepares for his daughter's (Kimberly Williams) wedding.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.
